description_long: This object is a medium-sized kitchen knife with a broad, straight-edged blade and a pointed tip, suitable for slicing and chopping. The blade is metallic, exhibiting a matte, slightly reflective finish, and appears robust and sharp. The handle is ergonomically contoured, made of a dark, likely wooden or composite material, and is smoothly finished for comfortable gripping. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, giving it a streamlined appearance. The knife lacks any decorative ornamentation, focusing on functionality and simplicity. No sheath or protective cover is present with the object.
description: A medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight, pointed blade and a smooth, contoured dark handle. The design is functional and unadorned, with no guard or sheath.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade and handle, highlighting the straight edge and pointed tip.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the handle's width and ergonomic contour, with the blade appearing as a thin line.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the knife, again showing the blade's length and the handle's smooth finish.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the handle's rounded end and the blade's thin profile.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, smooth, dark wood or composite, rounded end
